title: salix aurita var. spathulata
intro: Salix aurita var. spathulata is a variety of the willow plant, specifically a narrow-leaved form of the meadow willow (Salix aurita). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin that has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix aurita var. spathulata include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and muscle aches, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
